title: Manufacturing Overview
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module introduces the complete stainless steel manufacturing process followed at Jindal Stainless Limited, from raw material procurement to finished product dispatch.
learningObjectives: Understand the complete stainless steel manufacturing workflow.
Understand how different manufacturing departments are connected.
Recognize the importance of quality at every stage.
Learn the overall production flow before studying individual processes.

content.introduction: Manufacturing at JSL is an integrated process where raw materials are transformed into high-quality stainless steel products through a series of controlled operations using advanced equipment, automation, and quality assurance systems.
content.overview: Each manufacturing stage has a specific purpose. The output of one process becomes the input of the next process, ensuring continuous production and consistent product quality.
content.summary: The manufacturing process at JSL is a continuous and integrated production system where every stage contributes to producing high-quality stainless steel products while maintaining safety, efficiency, and sustainability.
